items.title: Level Zero — Chapter 01: The Morning Of
items.description: The system ranked Rowan Vale as the weakest. That morning, everything else was still ordinary.

items.title: Level Zero — Chapter 02: Ceremony of Measure
items.description: The ranking ceremony. Every student learns their place. Rowan learns his last.

items.title: Level Zero — Chapter 03: The First Test
items.description: The first test after ranking. What can the weakest skill actually do?

items.title: Analyze — Rowan Vale Intro Trailer
items.description: Rowan Vale receives the Analyze skill. An official series trailer.

items.title: Analyze — Analyzing the System Trailer
items.description: What happens when someone with the right skill asks the wrong question about the system?
